codeReview.summary: The feature does not satisfy VAL-I18N-005 yet. Although many popup labels were moved onto LocaleKey lookups, the popup still contains multiple hardcoded Chinese and English strings in app-owned usage/reset helpers and the update banner, so the popup does not switch fully between English and Chinese in the same running session.

issues.description: `format_reset_time` still hardcodes Chinese copy (`"正在重置..."`, `"明天 ..."`). Weekly/session reset text therefore remains Chinese even when `ui_language` is English, which breaks the required live-switch behavior for representative usage/reset labels.

Popup detail labels are still hardcoded instead of coming from `locale.rs`: `usage_display_label` returns `"已使用"/"剩余"`, and the detail card also prints `"状态："`, `"剩余"`, `"今日"`, and `"近 30 天"` directly (for example at lines 2008, 2153, 2239, and 2244). English mode will still show Chinese text in core popup content.

The popup's update-banner flow is still hardcoded in English (`Downloading …`, `Update failed: …`, `Update available: …`, `Restart & Update`, `Retry`, `Download`). That leaves the representative non-happy-path popup state outside the locale system, so the Chinese live-switch path is incomplete.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The mission guidance and shared service commands disagree about how to run Rust tests on this Linux host.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: `/home/fsos/.factory/missions/feb91986-560d-4e43-a848-dc0107da8c15/AGENTS.md` says not to use bare `cargo test` from `rust/` and to pass `--target x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu`, but `/home/fsos/Developer/Win-CodexBar/.factory/services.yaml` still defines `test: cargo test --manifest-path ...` with no target override. Transcript session `59c404ac-40c9-44ec-8822-8c737a777fb7` shows the first bare test run failed before the worker retried with the Linux target.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The feature contract's precondition about existing language persistence was stale, which pushed unexpected groundwork into a popup-only feature.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: `features.json` lines 360-362 say `The persisted language setting and shared locale source exist`, but the transcript records compile errors that `crate::settings::Language` and `Settings.ui_language` were missing, and commit `0e3fa1a` added both in `rust/src/settings.rs`.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The popup-localization skill and handoff feedback do not match what actually happened in the worker session.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: `/home/fsos/Developer/Win-CodexBar/.factory/skills/popup-localization-worker/SKILL.md` requires staying scoped to `locale.rs`/`app.rs`, adding failing tests first, and capturing Wine/Xvfb popup evidence. The transcript for session `59c404ac-40c9-44ec-8822-8c737a777fb7` shows direct edits in `rust/src/settings.rs`, no added tests, and EndFeatureRun verification without the skill's required interactive checks, yet the handoff's `skillFeedback.followedProcedure` is still `true`.

summary: Reviewed the feature handoff, transcript skeleton, skill, architecture/shared-state docs, and commit `0e3fa1a`. Result: fail. The popup localization is incomplete because several app-owned strings still bypass `LocaleKey` lookups, including reset/usage copy and the update-banner failure/download flow.
